arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Accrington – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome League Two outfit Accrington Stanley to Anfield on Saturday lunchtime for the third round of the FA Cup. Premier League leaders Liverpool lost away from home for the first time this season during the week.
